AdGuard Tracking Protection Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=8.0&system_version=&browser=firefox&filters=2.3&dns.enabled=false&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&win.wfp=true)

comment.body:
`https://static.airbridge.io/sdk/latest/airbridge.min.js` - already blocked by `||static.airbridge.io/sdk/`.
`static.groobee.io` - An analytics & remind-wall & offside reminding service - https://groobee.net/. But, I do not add this domain to prevent a potential breakage. 
`inapp.blux.ai` - I cloud not find this domain with a real Android device.

issue.title: www.elliott.org
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.elliott.org/company-contacts/samsung/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.elliott.org%2Fcompany-contacts%2Fsamsung%2F) ### Comment > The webpage redirects me to error-report.com and appears to be detecting the adblocker. ### Screenshots
